---
name: Feature request
about: Got an idea that would make Lune better? Pitch it here.
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: saraansx

---

**What problem does this solve?**
Describe the gap, friction, or missing behaviour you keep running into.

**Proposed solution**
What you would like to see added or changed in Lune.

**Alternatives you considered**
Any other approaches or workarounds you thought about.

**Additional context**
Screenshots, links, or anything else that helps explain the request.
